content: Dual ESM/CJS npm publishing pitfalls: (1) types field at root may not align with conditional exports — types must be placed inside each condition (import/require). (2) TS does not emit .d.cts from a single .ts source natively; need tsup/tsdown. (3) 'type':'module' at root breaks CJS consumers unless exports.require path is correct. (4) Missing 'files' whitelist causes dist/ exclusion or over-inclusion of src/. (5) exports must precede main/module for modern resolvers. (6) Validate with 'Are the Types Wrong?' tool before publishing. (7) Node16/NodeNext moduleResolution incompatible with old 'node' settings. (8) Minification via webpack/esbuild breaks reflect-metadata and decorator-based ODMs.
